Silver-Plated Bracer  
 


Slot: WRIST
AC: 7
SV DISEASE: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Silver-Plated Bracer

Slot: WRIST
AC: 7
SV DISEASE: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD MNK BRD ROG BER
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:72
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-09 03:39:07
Page Updated:Sat Apr 15th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Upper Guk
NPC Name
The Fabled Froglok Shin Lord
the froglok shin lord


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Upper Guk


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Monk usable
QuoteReply
# Oct 03 2003 at 11:48 AM Rating: Default
animekenji
1,123 posts
If this item is monk usable, and monks are a leather class, then shouldn't druids be able to use it, too?? So should clerics. I sometimes fail to understand the reasoning behind making items usable by certain classes and not others. All leather goods should be usable by any class that can wear leather or better.
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
RE: Monk usable
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2005 at 11:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760803480
View User Forum
277 posts
I like to think of it that the effects of this item only work when worn by one with a 'fighter's' spirit, so it is pointless for druids/shaman/cleric to equip, cos they would get no benefit :)

thats my crappy RP reason :D
▲ Page top
Pallies
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2003 at 4:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760429569
22 posts
Pallies can outtaunt pretty much any class if they know what they are doing. My 54 pally can and has on many occasions outtaunted a 60+ war simply by using stun and root. Stuns grab major agro. And when a mob is rooted it will attack the closest person to it. Sure HT will grab SOME agro but its limited to 1 hit. Once the pally taunts or stuns again the mob is on him/her (tho ive yet to see a female pally). If you have 2 pallies in a group you can almost be assured the casters wont grab agro if both pallies chain stun.
▲ Page top
price??
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2003 at 8:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591783879081
287 posts
would ne1 buy this if so how much?? thanks
▲ Page top
ROTHLMAOUTMAFO
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2002 at 4:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779947950
198 posts
You guys are dumb, why are you guys arguing if it is plate or not, it says plated get it? PLATED means coated, dipped not real! if it was SILVER PLATE BRACERS that would be different and just because it looks like plate doesn't mean ****. Think about it, gold plated earrings look gold to me. And hence the name does say SILVER plated for the intellectually numb people out there this armor is plated in silver. Silver is a type of metal. It is similar to steel and is shiny. so I can see how it looks like Plate armor. So all you ppl out there saying this is plate, you really need to learn yer English language a tad bit better.
▲ Page top
RE: ROTHLMAOUTMAFO
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2003 at 5:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592260407628
1 post
Please, if you are going to flame people and play the professor then you had best at least make a meager attempt to sound intelligent. Silver is not like steel. Silver is an element. Steel is an alloy. Shut up and please post constructive so that I don't have to filter through your incompetence.

"Vlad"
No seasons rubbish
No guild rubbish
No server rubbish
Just was most likely in the middle of my various combinations of all of the above when you were still level 1.

Some of you are very dumb. You guys dont know the difference between complete plate armor and platED armor this is not plate armor it is just silver coated hence the name silver platED. and for that post way down there serpentine bracers arent plate either if these things were really plate armor they would have like 10AC and they dont this is close but no cigar buddies................ just my 2cp

RE: yes it is plate
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 9:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248132329
41 posts
actaully no its not Plate...it IS plated. which means that it is some type of material plated or covered in silver. that little d on the end makes a big difference. but really who cares what it is or what its called the only thing that matters is can i use it, is it better then what i got now or can i sell it for lots of cash....and the answer is yes no no ( in this case)

Paladins rock they can save a entire party if the cleric going down and he is the only healer they do loh and the wholl group is saved. I have done it many times


wolfpact
16paladin
solusek ro
▲ Page top
RE: paladins rock
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 8:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249395162
97 posts
he has a point. i rarely use LOH on anyone but myself becuase were don't do more damage the warriors, we cann't heal like clreci, and we can cast spells like other casting raceses except for rangers and SK. but like he said a SK is able to do a lot of damage with HT, how ever a paladin can out tuant a warrior there level as matter of fact i out tuant and damage most warriors at my level, and that incudes the major twinks i out every thing them. just wait till you get FD then see how fast people want you in a group (you can bash with the weapon and it dies alot of damage)
▲ Page top
RE: paladins rock
QuoteReply
# May 28 2002 at 12:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759179636
Scholar
62 posts
out taunt an sk?

if you are outtaunting sk's in your party then they either don't know what they are doing, or are not trying to get aggro.

with our debuff and dot spells and when bashing with 1h weapon we can easily outtaunt even a warrior.

the only class i ever have problems getting aggro off of is a bard.

in my guild, which is comprised mostly of lvl 60 players, the main role of the sk's is to taunt and place mobs because they are the best at it.

paladins i think tank better than sk's though cuz they have more hp's i think. (not sure on this). also LOH is better than HT i think. HT is really not THAT much damage. i mean at lvl 35 doing 350 dmg. is great, but once a day??? not real useful. occasionally saves a party, but as you say LOH'ing the cleric when he is going down is more important.
▲ Page top
RE: paladins rock
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2003 at 12:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760083053
78 posts
i agree that sks are good at holding agro, sometimes even when they dont want to. this kinda sucks seeing as im a warrior. lol

RE: paladins rock
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2001 at 2:40 PM Rating: Default
Darknyss
Scholar
551 posts
I've hardly ever seen a Pally use his LoH on anyone but himself... That's why Pally's aren't so big in groups, whereas a ShadowKnight will use HT when him OR the team is in trouble.

Back to the bracers.... does this look like plate on a Wood-elf Ranger?
____________________________
Pain Lord Darknyss Grimscale
92 Iksar Crusader of the Greenmist
▲ Page top
RE: paladins rock
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2003 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784845892
27 posts
I am sorry to say some pally are a crummy self-center player..and that's not how that class should be play imho. IF you look at the class description of a pally..it's Valor, honor, noble etc...and if you check out the AA they even got something call ACT OF VALOR. Where a pally would sacrifice his HP to save someone.
I play a pally and I use my Lay hand sparingly. when I solo it's on myself ..but when i am in a group..it's ON those that need Lay hand the most and cleric is oom I don't even think of using it on myself unless we are doing some serious name mob.

Now if you want to compare how Grand a SK is..well they are pure and simple "EVIL". How can something evil be noble?! as for their Harm touch--how can Harm someone be good??! So the choice is really to use HT on mob or use it on a MOB, NOT very hard to do..but with LH it's self or other. And when a pally is tanking they got very short amount of time before they or their group member dies...so they don't have that long to think about using it. And just because a pally have a higher purpose on the class they play doesn't mean they are any less then an SK who is supposedly be "good".

If you have experience the bad part of a Pally then you have yet to experience the better part but not every pally is the same and or will act selfishly.

▲ Page top
RE: paladins rock
QuoteReply

4 posts

QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 7:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755048933
Scholar
127 posts
Rangers cannot use non-magical plate armor. However, they can where some of the Magical plate armor types. Its a restricted list, but yes, we CAN wear plate in some instances. :)

# Nov 07 2001 at 9:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765414838
55 posts
This IS plate armor. Hence the name. Also, look at the graphic. Also, i believe even int the EQ booklet or on one of the major websites (this one or CAsters Realm i believe) in the character creation section, tells how rangers are able to use some high level plate armors. This is plate in my opinion. Also, isn't a serpentine bracer a form of plate? Judging by the skin... I say so, AND monks can wear as well. Oh well, its Verant's fault for being inconsistant, so dont flame eachother or the items over petty differences and odditties. Also, isnt mithril plate? and cant rogues wear? Just my thoughts.
